sect1.title: Organization
sect1.para: This book is divided into the following parts:
This part contains essential information which is needed to understand the rest of the book.
sect1.bridgehead: Part II - General Libraries and Utilities
sect1.para: This part covers libraries and utilities that you may want or need. Many packages can depend on the packages covered within. It also covers toolchains for those that may need them.
This part covers packages for setting up a server, which can include web hosting (major servers), mail server software, databases, and other stuff.
This part covers graphical components that may be useful and help with debugging and testing or be useful in their own right.
sect1.bridgehead: Part V - Window Managers, Compositors, and Desktop Environments
sect1.para: This part covers graphical environments you may wish to use.
This part covers many emulators for computers, vide game consoles, and more.
This part covers gaming support software that is not covered in BLFS and GLFS.
This part covers SVR4 tooling and various software.
The Appendices present information which doesn't belong in the body of book; they are included as reference material. The glossary of acronyms is a handy feature.
